title: osbeckia aspera var. courtallensis
intro: Osbeckia aspera var. courtallensis, also known as the Courtallensium Osbeckia, is a variant of the Osbeckia aspera plant species, a flowering plant native to the Western Ghats region of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Osbeckia aspera var. courtallensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant often include its leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
